eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Stark, ND; at 5:08 PM on JUL 31, 2019 Effective until 6:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: AT&T mobile service is currently experiencing a service interruption in Stark County. In the event AT&T mobile customers need emergency assistance, please dial 9 1 1 from a non-AT&T mobile device or landline phone until service is restored.
